productDisplayName: Clarks Men Goto Hi Cola Suede Brown Shoes
description: Blending contemporary style with a vintage influence, this Goto Hi suede leather boot from clarks delivers a contemporary look with absolute comfort. The saccheto stitch detailing ensures it stays with you for years to come.UpperFull suede leather upper with saccheto stitched construction for a fashionable, distressed finish and absolute comfortLacing system for a snug, customized FitLeather inner lining for absolute comfort and abrasion-free wearMidsoleEVA midsole for lightweight, flexible comfortCushioned footbed for all-day comfort OutsoleWave grooved rubber forefoot with a leather midfoot for absolute durability and tractionMan-made outsole with a raised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlightWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
